description: MainActivity class implementation for an Android app handling authentication, biometric unlock, and UI rendering based on app state.

classes.name: MainActivity
classes.description: An activity managing app lifecycle, authentication states, biometric unlock, and dynamic UI rendering.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Initializes activity, sets content view, adds lifecycle observer, and calls render.

methods.name: onResume
methods.description: Re-renders UI when activity resumes to reflect current state.

methods.name: render
methods.description: Determines current app state and displays corresponding UI or error message.

methods.name: showInitFailure
methods.description: Displays an error screen if application failed to initialize.

methods.name: showLogin
methods.description: Displays login UI and handles login button click to attempt user login.

methods.name: showLocked
methods.description: Displays biometric unlock screen and handles biometric authentication.

methods.name: showMain
methods.description: Displays main app UI with session info, API call button, and logout button.

methods.name: setRoot
methods.description: Replaces current root view with a new view.
